featureName: OPS-002: Gate G088 top-level certifiedAt backlog remediation
planningOnlyJustification: Portfolio-wide governance remediation. The deliverable is a reproducible classification of the G088 certifiedAt backlog plus one faithful schema backfill (spec 018 state.json). The bulk recert is per-spec, review-gated work and CANNOT be promoted to a delivery without fabricating certification reviews; Gate G093 correctly blocks promotion past statusCeiling=specs_hardened for this metadata-only packet.

executionHistory.summary: Promoted the recurring stochastic-sweep G088 finding into a tracked ops packet. Authored analysis.py (read-only classifier), classified the portfolio (66/78 done specs fail G088: 45 missing top-level certifiedAt, 21 stale; the 45 split into 1 clean-backfill / 38 needs-recert / 6 no-source), executed the single faithful clean backfill (spec 018 state.json: surfaced historical lastUpdatedAt 2026-05-24T22:00:00Z to top-level certifiedAt; post-cert-spec-edit-guard PASS), and recorded the review-gated remainder. Deliberately did NOT bulk-recertify: the post-cert planning commits are a mix of benign housekeeping and substantive work, so a blanket CURRENT spec-review recert would fabricate reviews and violate the anti-fabrication policy. Terminates at specs_hardened per the OPS-001 precedent; the per-spec recert is tracked follow-on work matching the sweep's own recommendation.

scopeProgress.name: Classify the G088 backlog and execute the clean-backfill slice

notes: Per-spec faithful recert precedents: BUG-029-007, BUG-024-004, BUG-049-002, BUG-054-001.
